Conflict.description: The Agent/session state rejects this action, or an Idempotency-Key is already processing or was reused for a different request.

Forbidden.description: The caller cannot consume this Agent.

InvalidRequest.description: The request shape or query value is invalid.

NotFound.description: The resource was not found for this caller.

RateLimited.description: The API token exceeded the public API request budget for the current window.

Retry-After.description: Seconds to wait before retrying the request.

Unauthenticated.description: A valid API token is required.

files.description: Draft file handles uploaded by the same API token caller.

kind.description: Files added through the public API are attachments; artifacts are files produced by the Agent.

publicApiBearer.description: Use Authorization: Bearer mst_... . API tokens identify an account and do not carry scopes.

info.description: Public HTTPS API for creating and retrieving Threads on published Mosoo Agents. v1 resource identifiers are bare ULIDs, not prefixed IDs. API tokens identify the account caller. Runtime execution resolves the published Agent owner capabilities while the Thread is associated with the API token owner.
info.title: Mosoo Published Agent API

get.description: Returns Threads created by the authenticated API token caller.

parameters.description: The published Agent's agentId from the Agent's API Access panel. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: agentId

get.summary: List Threads for a published Agent

post.description: Creates a Thread and the backing AgentSession. If input is present, Mosoo also queues the initial Run. If input is omitted, the Thread is immediately visible with IDLE status and no run. API token calls are associated with the API token owner.

parameters.description: The published Agent's agentId from the Agent's API Access panel. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: agentId

parameters.description: Optional key for retry-safe create-thread and send-events calls. Reusing the same key with the same request returns the original response. Reusing the key while the original request is still processing returns 409.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

humanPatWithFile.summary: API token with an uploaded file

content.text: Summarize the attached launch plan and list follow-ups.

cattleAgentSameShape.summary: Cattle Agent using the same request shape

content.text: Run this one-off published Agent Thread.

post.summary: Create a Thread for a published Agent

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Present as true when this response is replayed from a previous completed request.

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

get.description: Returns the latest public event log entries for this Thread in chronological order. This is the stable snapshot read surface for CLI and API consumers; it does not expose raw runtime payloads, transcript, or diagnostics.

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

parameters.description: Maximum number of latest Thread events to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

parameters.description: Optional key for retry-safe create-thread and send-events calls. Reusing the same key with the same request returns the original response. Reusing the key while the original request is still processing returns 409.
parameters.name: Idempotency-Key

post.summary: Send user messages, permission decisions, or interrupts to a Thread

Idempotency-Replayed.description: Present as true when this response is replayed from a previous completed request.

get.description: Streams public Thread event log entries as Server-Sent Events. Each `thread.event` data payload uses the same ThreadEventLogEntry shape as GET /threads/{threadId}/events. The stream is for long-running consumer UX and does not expose raw runtime payloads, internal diagnostics, or private transcripts.

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

parameters.description: Maximum number of latest Thread events to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

post.description: Claims a ready draft file handle into this Thread. Upload file bytes through the files data plane first, then pass the resulting fileId here.

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

parameters.description: `threadId` returned by create thread. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: threadId

parameters.description: File ID returned by add or list Thread files. v1 IDs are bare ULIDs.
parameters.name: fileId
